description_long: This object is a modern, stylized stapler with a streamlined, aerodynamic form and a predominantly matte red exterior. The upper housing is smooth and slightly curved, with a subtle blue accent panel on one side, while the lower section is more angular and features a visible metallic mechanism. The stapler's jaws are open, revealing an orange internal plate and a metallic staple channel, with the front end designed for staple ejection. The rear section tapers and includes two fin-like extensions, adding to its futuristic appearance. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and plastic materials, with some exposed mechanical parts. No visible branding or rubber grip is present on the base.
description: A sleek, red, modern stapler with a curved top, blue accent, and exposed metallic mechanism, featuring fin-like rear extensions and an open jaw design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red upper housing, exposed metallic mechanism, and orange internal plate, with fin-like extensions at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow staple exit slot and the symmetrical, aerodynamic shape of the stapler.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blue accent panel and the open jaw structure, with visible metallic and orange internal components.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the twin fin-like extensions and the tapered back end of the stapler.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is smoothly contoured, slightly arched, and colored matte red, matching the upper housing. It appears to be made of hard plastic with no visible ergonomic texturing or grip patterns.
attribute_metal_hinge_mechanism: The metal hinge mechanism is partially visible at the rear and along the jaw, connecting the upper and lower parts. It consists of a metallic pin and channel, allowing the stapler to open and close smoothly. No external fasteners or screws are prominently visible.
attribute_staple_exit_slot: The staple exit slot is located at the front of the lower jaw, rectangular in shape, and is clearly visible in the front and side views. It is surrounded by a metallic channel and an orange internal plate.
